title: Marvell Technology Q1 2022 Earnings Preview
text: Marvell Technology was scheduled to announce Q1 earnings results on Monday, June 7, after market close. The consensus EPS Estimate was $0.27, up 50.0% year-over-year. The consensus Revenue Estimate was $817.12 million, up 17.8% year-over-year. Analysts expected Adjusted gross margin of 63.1%. Over the prior 2 years, MRVL had beaten EPS estimates 75% of the time and had beaten revenue estimates 88% of the time. Over the 3 months prior, EPS estimates had seen 2 upward revisions and 4 downward. Revenue estimates had seen 6 upward revisions and 0 downward.
